atlas_complete.title: Complete your Antique Atlas — fill in all major biomes and structures you visited

exposure_history.title: Take 5 photographs with the Exposure camera — document major locations from your journey

subtitle.text: You traveled the whole map. Now you record it. The atlas is a record of where you have been. Fill it in.

description: CH.15 · THE MAPPED WORLD
▸ Antique Atlas + Exposure: the documentation tools.
You traveled 17 chapters worth of territory.
The atlas should show it.
The photographs should document it.
History is what survives the traveler.
Make sure yours survives you.
◈ ANTIQUE ATLAS COMPLETION
└ Atlas fills as you walk — no active interaction needed
(keep atlas in inventory to record explored territory)
└ Custom markers: right-click on atlas to place named markers
Mark: your base, village, End portal, key farm sites,
dungeon locations, boss encounter sites
└ Sharing: atlases can be copied (Atlas + empty Atlas = copy)
Useful for multiplayer: share the full map with others
└ Atlas does NOT auto-mark structures — manual markers only
Mark every significant structure you want to find again
◈ EXPOSURE FILM CAMERA
└ Viewfinder: early camera — shows you what you are shooting
└ Camera: requires film (iron/paper construction)
└ Film roll: loads into camera, takes ~12 exposures per roll
└ Development: Darkroom block required to develop photos
└ Developed photos: display on item frames as photographs
(place in item frame on wall = wall photography display)
◈ DOCUMENTATION PRIORITY
└ Photograph: End portal room, Dragon fight site,
first End City, your base at each chapter milestone
└ Atlas markers: End portal location, all boss sites,
Poise Forest, True End entry point, resource farms
└ Book and Quill: written expedition journal (ch15_world task)
Pair with atlas and photos for full documentation set
▸ Antique Atlas used to say: here be dragons.
That was metaphor.
Your atlas says: here was the dragon.
Specific coordinates. Past tense.
You have been there. You have the photographs.
You have the journal entry.
That is the difference between legend and history.
You are making history.
▶ Complete your Antique Atlas with all major locations [check]
▶ Take 5 photographs to document your journey [check]
◇ Exposure photographs can be hung in frames in your base.
A gallery wall of the expedition is a Ch15 building project.
Recommended gallery contents: End portal, Dragon fight,
first city, outer island view, dragon egg on display.
This is what the previous civilizations did not leave behind.
Leave it behind.
